prompt: Build me a weather dashboard that shows current conditions, a 5-day forecast with icons, a temperature line chart, and a search bar for cities. Make it look really polished.

assertions.text: Writes a detailed specification before sending anything to OpenCode (Phase 1)
The spec includes an exact output file path
The spec includes specific UI details: layout structure, color scheme, responsive breakpoints, or interactions
Plans to use gpt-oss-120b on Cerebras for the draft generation
Plans a thorough review phase looking for specific bug categories (operator precedence, XSS, missing accessibility, etc.)
Plans a polish phase that goes beyond bug fixes to improve UX quality (animations, transitions, responsive design, accessibility)
Plans to report generation time and bugs found to the user at delivery
